item.title:
Omg - 我的前司出现大瓜！公司创始人，曾被授勋的爵士，被另一位女创业者实名抖出一件他曾经语言性骚扰的往事。
我读得津津有味啊看来吃瓜才是刚需。 https://t.co/Gv2BbGfE8p
item.description:

item.title: We’re partnering with the developers of @EveOnline to explore the next frontier of AI research in ga...
item.description:
We’re partnering with the developers of @EveOnline to explore the next frontier of AI research in games.
EVE's complex, player-driven universe is the perfect safe sandbox to test agents on memory, continual learning, and long-term planning.
Find out more → https://t.co/8D3d6a079C
--- @GoogleDeepMind | ❤️ 99 | 🔁 17 | 💬 14 | 👁 6217
item.author: @GoogleDeepMind

item.title:
My takeaway: AI in HR is a context problem disguised as a tooling problem.
You must teach the syst...
item.description:
My takeaway: AI in HR is a context problem disguised as a tooling problem.
You must teach the system how your organization thinks.
Where is AI breaking down in your HR workflow?
Comment “HR” &amp; I’ll share how to use AI in HR effectively.
#CorbeyPartner
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 75
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
The insight that stood out:
HR decisions depend on layered context.
Not just general rules, but pr...
item.description:
The insight that stood out:
HR decisions depend on layered context.
Not just general rules, but priorities.
For example:
→ National legislation sets the baseline → Company policy often overrides in practice → Edge cases change everything
If your AI is not trained on this, it will give the wrong answers confidently.
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 85
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon

item.title:
Most HR AI projects don’t fail because the tech is weak.
They fail because the AI has no idea how y...
item.description:
Most HR AI projects don’t fail because the tech is weak.
They fail because the AI has no idea how your company actually works.
That is the missing link.
I spoke with Anna Fedosova, co-founder of Corbey, about why this keeps happening.
Here’s the breakdown... https://t.co/FQ6TrYWgEe
--- @Ronald_vanLoon | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 133
item.author: @Ronald_vanLoon
